zh.lifeSummary: 當Valentine Pettit於1429年出生時，他的父親John Petit47歲，母親Margaret Trenowith29歲。他於大約1450年與Jane Anthorne在英國英格蘭可瓦爾費爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世在英國可瓦爾聖 馬根，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pettit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Petit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Michel, Normand, Mireille, Philippe, Pierre, Achille, Armand, Jean Claude, Jean Jacques, Ketly, Adrien.

French, Walloon, Catalan, English, Jewish (from southern France), West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian: from (Old) French, Catalan, and Middle English petit ‘small’, hence a nickname for a small man (or an ironic nickname for a big man), or a distinguishing name for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name. Compare Little , Petee , and Petite .

History: Charles Petit from Anneville-Ambourville in Seine-Maritime, France, married Jeanne Rossignol (Martin and Renée Desjardins) in Quebec City, QC, in 1670. Nicolas Petit dit Lapré/Laprée from Le Gué-d'Alleré in Charente-Maritime, France, married Marie Pouponnel in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1656. Pierre Petit dit Gobin from Lyon in Rhône married Marguerite Véron in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1692. Pierre Petit dit Saint-Pierre from Évreux in Eure, France, married Judith Miville in Quebec City, QC, in 1758; see also St. Pierre . — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Valentine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Valentine Pettit was born in 1429, his father, John Petit, was 47 and his mother, Margaret Trenowith, was 29. He married Jane Anthorne about 1450, in Philleigh, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in St Mawgan, Cornwall, England, and was buried in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valentine Pettit est né en 1429, son père, John Petit, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret Trenowith, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Jane Anthorne environ 1450, à Philleigh, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé à St Mawgan, Cornouailles, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Allen, Cornwall, England: St Allen, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom

Er hat um 1450 in Philleigh, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Jane Anthorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb in St Mawgan, Cornwall, England und wurde in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Jane Anthorne circa 1450, nel Philleigh, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel St Mawgan, Cornwall, England, e fu sepolto a Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Valentine Pettitが1429年に生まれた時，父John Petitは47歳，母Margaret Trenowithは29歳であった。約1450年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルフィレイグでJane Anthorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスコルンワルスト マウガンで死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Valentine Pettit(이)가 1429년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Petit(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Trenowith(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 필리에서 Jane Anthorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 코른월 스트 마w건에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Jane Anthorne aproximadamente 1450, em Philleigh, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valentine Pettit родился в 1429 г., его отцу по имени John Petit было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Trenowith, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Anthorne около 1450 г. в местности филлиг, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в местности ст мавган, корнвалл, Англия и был похоронен в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.
